resources.string: "Ukwenza ifoni ishaje ngokushesha"
"Ukwenza ifoni ishaje ngokungaxhunyiwe"
"Idivayisi maduze izovalwa, cindezela ukuze uyigcine ivuliwe."
"Ayikho i-SIM efonini."
"Iphinikhodi ayifani"
"Uzame ngokungalungile ukuvula ifoni izikhathi ezingu-%1$d. Ngemuva kwemizamo engaphezulu kwengu-%2$d engaphumelelanga, le foni izosethwa kabusha, okuzosusa yonke idatha yayo."
"Uzame ngokungalungile ukuvula ifoni izikhathi ezingu-%d. Le foni izosethwa kabusha, okuzosusa yonke idatha yayo."
"Uzame ngokungalungile ukuvula ifoni izikhathi ezingu-%1$d. Ngemuva kwemizamo engaphezulu kwengu-%2$d engaphumelelanga, lo msebenzisi uzosuswa, okuzosusa yonke idatha yomsebenzisi."
"Uzame ngokungalungile ukuvula ifoni izikhathi ezingu-%d. Lo msebenzisi uzosuswa, okuzosusa yonke idatha yomsebenzisi."
"Uzame ngokungalungile ukuvula ifoni izikhathi ezingu-%1$d. Ngemuva kwemizamo engaphezulu kwengu-%2$d engaphumelelanga, iphrofayela yomsebenzi, izosuswa, okuzosusa yonke idatha yephrofayela."
"Uzame ngokungalungile ukuvula ifoni izikhathi ezingu-%d. Iphrofayela yomsebenzi izosuswa, okuzosusa yonke idatha yephrofayela."

"Ukulayisha ungenisa iphathini yakho yokuvula ngendlela engalungile izikhathi ezi-%1$d Emva kweminye imizamo engu-%2$d, uzocelwa ukuvula ifoni yakho usebenzisa ukungena ngemvume ku-Google\n\n Zame futhi emumva kwengu- %3$d imizuzwana."
"Ifoni ivaliwe ngenxa yokushisa"
"Ifoni yakho manje isebenza ngokuvamile.\nThepha ukuze uthole ulwazi olungeziwe"

"Ifoni yakho ibishisa kakhulu, ngakho-ke yacisha ukuze iphole. Ifoni yakho manje isebenza ngokuvamile.

Ifoni yakho ingashisa kakhulu uma:
 • Usebenzisa izinhlelo zokusebenza ezinkulu (njegegeyimu, ividiyo, noma ama-app okufuna)
 • Landa noma layisha amafayela amakhulu
 • Sebenzisa ifoni yakho kumazinga okushisa aphezulu"
"Ifoni iyafudumala"
"Ezinye izakhi zikhawulelwe ngenkathi ifoni iphola.\nThepha mayelana nolwazi olwengeziwe"
"Ifoni yakho izozama ngokuzenzakalela ukuphola. Ungasasebenzisa ifoni yakho, kodwa ingasebenza ngokungasheshi.\n\nUma ifoni yakho isipholile, izosebenza ngokuvamile."
"Inzwa yesigxivizo somunwe esenkinobhweni yamandla. Inkinobho eyisicaba eduze kwenkinobho yevolumu eliphakanyisiwe onqenqemeni lwefoni."
"Vula ifoni yakho ukuthola okunye okungakhethwa"
"Okudlala kule foni"
